arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois is Real Madrid's undisputed number one goalkeeper and is still regarded as one of the best in the business.

arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly set an asking price of £59m for Eduardo Camavinga, with Paris Saint-Germain and Manchester City both keen on him.

arts.sum: Real Madrid's Arda Guler is supposedly attracting interest from Eintracht Frankfurt, who are keeping a watchful eye over his playing situation at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid suffer last-minute injury blow
arts.sum: The training session ahead of the game against Rayo Vallecano also included several youth players: goalkeepers Fran González, Mestre and Súnico, defenders Laimini Fati, Fortea and Diego Aguado and striker Barroso . Real Madrid faces defensive concerns ahead of their LaLiga clash against Rayo Vallecano this Sunday 9 March at 11:15am ET in the 27th round of the competition.
